Mtn For Order To Charge Interest
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ANDREW AZARMI, ESQ., 415.356.4631, FOR PETITIONER AIRPORT BOULEVARD REALTY LLC.
MARK ELLIS, ESQ., 916.283.8820, FOR RESPONDENT HB&C ASSOCIATES LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PETITIONER AIRPORT BOULEVARD REALTY LLC'S Motion For Order To Charge Interest and to foreclose is granted as to Petitioner's motion to charge Respondent HBC Associates, LLC's membership interest in Petitioner Airport Boulevard Realty, LLC. (CCP 708.310.) Denied, without prejudice, as to Petitioner's motion to foreclose on Respondent's membership interest in Petitioner. (Corp. Code 17705.03(b)(3).) Respondent's request for a stay is denied. (CCP 918, 918.5.) Respondent's request for appraisal is not supported by citation to any legal authority and is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.
